Evening (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $12,406,646Details
International Box Office $478,928
Worldwide Box Office $12,885,574
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$3,501,971 (28.2% of total gross)
Legs:3.54 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:96.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:977 opening theaters/979 max. theaters, 3.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $21,567,372

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 29th, 2007 (Wide) by Focus Features
Video Release: September 25th, 2007 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some thematic elements, sexual material, a brief accident scene and language.
Running Time: 117 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Same Role, Multiple Actors
Plot point: Closeted Homosexual, LGBTQ+, Love Triangle, Non-Chronological, Romance, Terminal Illness
Social setting: Wedding Day
Source material: Novel or Other Work Adapted by Author
Subgenre: Romantic Drama
Time period setting: 1950s
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
